component.name: Wisco Radio CW Trainer
component.summary: Learn Morse code with the Koch method and a QSO simulator

description.p: A focused trainer for amateur-radio Morse code (CW) that takes you from your very first two characters all the way to a full on-air contact.

ul.li: Koch-method character lessons — full-speed characters with Farnsworth spacing, one new character per lesson
Copy practice up a six-rung ladder: single characters, pairs, groups, ham words, callsigns, and full QSO phrases
Sending practice with a built-in iambic paddle and straight-key decoder that shows exactly what your fist sends
A QSO simulator with POTA, SOTA, IOTA, and ragchew contacts, including on-air break-in fills
Realistic band conditions: selectable receiver filtering, QSB signal fading, and AGC
Reference guides on CW lingo, on-air procedure, and the history of the code

screenshot.caption: The QSO simulator working a POTA contact
